subcodes.first_line: O compassionate friends! Cause Faran to overflow, and like unto Mount Faran, become manifest as a dawning-place of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان فارانرا بفوران آرید و مانند جبل فاران معرض تجلی رحمان نمااید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @Manifestation of God as sun, @Mosaic imagery
